description: Input schema for Skill 07 — Brand Voice. All fields required unless noted. HALT conditions enforced before execution.

validated_niche.description: Validated niche string from PHASE-1-OUTPUT.md. Must match exactly.

price_point.description: Product price point in USD. Controls NESB transformation scale.

dominant_emotion.description: Primary emotional driver identified for this niche audience.

dominant_persona.description: Primary buyer persona as identified in Skill 04.

psychographic.description: One of: anxious overachiever | aspirational | burnt-out | cautious buyer | status seeker | anti-conformist | other (specify)

top_3_uvp.description: Top 3 Unique Value Propositions from Phase 1 output. Exactly 3 strings.

verbatim_samples.description: Exact persona quotes sourced from Skill 04 research. MINIMUM 3 — skill HALTS if fewer.

text.description: Exact verbatim quote from real persona. No paraphrasing.

source_url.description: URL where the quote was found (Reddit, YouTube comment, Amazon review, forum, etc.)

verbatim_samples.halt_message: [BLOCKING ERROR: brand-voice — minimum 3 verbatim samples required from Skill 04]

competitor_names.description: List of direct competitor brand or product names to differentiate voice against.

visual_identity_ref.description: Relative file path to the 06-visual-identity.json output. Skill HALTS if file not found.

halt_conditions.error: [BLOCKING ERROR: brand-voice — minimum 3 verbatim samples required from Skill 04]

halt_conditions.condition: visual_identity_ref file not found on disk
